docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,351.34 FILED BY LEWIS ROSE MD AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS NORMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS NORMA
7/25/90 RETURN RECEIPT MAIL. PROOF OF SERVICE RECD 8/15/90 JUDGMENT FOR DEFT NORMA SIMMONS HEARD BY G BORGES. 8/17/90 MO TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT SET
FOR 9/7/90 AT 8AM. 9/7/90 MO TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT GRANTED. NEW DATE SET FOR 10/9/90 AT 8AM. 10/9/90 CONTINUTED TO 1/4/91 AT 8AM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEWIS ROSE MD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMMONS NORMA $1,351.34 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,359.34, AND $184.40 INTEREST STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SIMMONS NORMA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 20716, RECORD TRANSFERRED
